g.text: [util-button] On-board Control Buttons and Smart RESET

g.desc: [util-button] On-board Control Buttons and Smart RESET

g.text: * Usage of this IC is optional, but recommended, as it allows for setting up the board for

g.desc: * Usage of this IC is optional, but recommended, as it allows for setting up the board for

g.text: programming with a single button (i.e., the RESET button). When RESET button is pressed

g.desc: programming with a single button (i.e., the RESET button). When RESET button is pressed

g.text: for at least 7.5s, BOOT line will be forced high, and will enable SoC boot from system

g.desc: for at least 7.5s, BOOT line will be forced high, and will enable SoC boot from system

g.text: * This same BOOT signal is passed to the host, such that programming can happen on all

g.desc: * This same BOOT signal is passed to the host, such that programming can happen on all

g.text: sides (host and board). Of course, need or support for BOOT signal varies according to

g.desc: sides (host and board). Of course, need or support for BOOT signal varies according to

g.text: the MCU. The capacitor and resistor on BOOT line are just assurances in case anything

g.desc: the MCU. The capacitor and resistor on BOOT line are just assurances in case anything

g.text: goes wrong, or if the IC is deemed unnecessary.

g.desc: goes wrong, or if the IC is deemed unnecessary.

g.text: * Usage of this IC is totally optional.

g.desc: * Usage of this IC is totally optional.

g.text: It can be left un-populated if not needed.

g.desc: It can be left un-populated if not needed.

g.text: * When ~{BTN} is pressed for at least 7.5s,

g.desc: * When ~{BTN} is pressed for at least 7.5s,

g.text: ~{RST} will be forced low. This can be used

g.desc: ~{RST} will be forced low. This can be used

g.text: to force a whole-board reset (including host)

g.desc: to force a whole-board reset (including host)

g.text: without having to provide easy access to the

g.desc: without having to provide easy access to the

g.text: * Keep ~{BTN} pressed for at least 8.5s and

g.desc: * Keep ~{BTN} pressed for at least 8.5s and

g.text: the Power Path IC will also reset and

g.desc: the Power Path IC will also reset and

g.text: force the whole board to power-cycle.

g.desc: force the whole board to power-cycle.
